# Driveway Gates London

> London's trusted driveway gate installer matching service. We connect homeowners with vetted, experienced gate installers across all 32 London boroughs.

## About

Driveway Gates London is a free matching service that connects London homeowners with vetted gate installers. Every installer in our network has completed at least 50 residential gate installations, carries full public liability and professional indemnity insurance, and offers written warranties. Homeowners pay nothing to use the service. Installers pay a referral fee only when a job goes ahead.

## Services

- Electric Sliding Gates: /services/electric-sliding-gates/
- Electric Swing Gates: /services/electric-swing-gates/
- Wooden Driveway Gates: /services/wooden-driveway-gates/
- Metal Driveway Gates: /services/metal-driveway-gates/
- Automated Gate Systems: /services/automated-gate-systems/
- Gate Repair and Maintenance: /services/gate-repair-and-maintenance/
- Gate Automation Retrofit: /services/gate-automation-kits/
- Aluminium Driveway Gates: /services/aluminium-driveway-gates/
- Composite Driveway Gates: /services/composite-driveway-gates/
- Hardwood Driveway Gates: /services/hardwood-driveway-gates/
- Wrought Iron Gates: /services/wrought-iron-gates/
- Pedestrian and Side Gates: /services/pedestrian-side-gates/
- Commercial Gates: /commercial/
- Access Control Systems: /services/access-control/

## Coverage

We cover all of Greater London including North London (Barnet, Enfield, Finchley, Hampstead, Highgate, Mill Hill), South London (Bromley, Croydon, Dulwich, Wimbledon, Kingston), East London (Ilford, Romford, Stratford, Canary Wharf, Greenwich), and West London (Richmond, Ealing, Chiswick, Hounslow, Twickenham), plus Central London and surrounding areas.

- Location pages: /location/

## Guides

- Guides hub: /guides/
- Blog: /blog/
- Local regulations by borough: /local-regulations/

## Key Facts

- Service area: Greater London, all 32 boroughs
- Installer vetting: minimum 50 completed residential projects
- Insurance: full public liability and professional indemnity required
- Typical installation: 2-4 working days
- Price range: from £2,500 (manual wooden gates) to £12,000+ (premium electric sliding gates with full automation)
- Finance: 0% interest-free options available from £99/month
- Free site surveys with no obligation

## Contact

Website: https://www.drivewaygateslondon.co.uk
